OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported.
Appearances:
Michael Rossoff, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff The Tides Center, represented by agent: --
Rita Tautkus, Esq., through limited scope, for and with the Defendant(s): Timothy Martin
The Judge Pro Tem Mark Seidenfeld, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304-B for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement
"Stipulation for Entry of Judgment or Dismissal with Prejudice", which was NOT filed.
Case settled, matter is taken off calendar.
